name: Engineers India Limited
growth_plan: Targeting Rs 15,000+ Cr order book by FY27 via green hydrogen consulting mandates, refinery modernization, and offshore wind energy EPC advisory.
peer_moat: India's only listed PSU engineering consultancy with 60+ years of refinery/petrochemical FEED expertise, pre-qualified with virtually every Indian PSU oil & gas company.
near_catalyst: Rs 1 lakh Cr+ green hydrogen Mission and HPCL/BPCL/IOCL refinery expansion DFRs converting to EPC orders in FY26-27.
key_risk: Government capex slowdown or disinvestment overhang

name: GE Vernova T&D India Limited
growth_plan: Order book Rs 10,000+ Cr (2.5x book-to-bill) driven by 765kV+ UHVDC transmission orders under Rs 2.4 lakh Cr National Grid expansion plan.
peer_moat: One of only 2-3 Indian players qualified to manufacture 765kV gas-insulated switchgear (GIS) and power transformers, backed by GE Vernova's global tech transfer.
near_catalyst: 500 GW renewable target requires massive transmission buildout; PGCIL capex doubling to Rs 40,000 Cr/year in FY26-27.
key_risk: Execution delays on large EPC orders and working capital strain

name: Lloyds Metals And Energy Limited
growth_plan: Ramping up 3 MTPA integrated steel plant at Ghugus (Maharashtra) with captive iron ore mines (~250 MT reserves), targeting full commissioning by FY26 with Phase 2 to 5 MTPA by FY28.
peer_moat: Only sponge iron/steel player with captive iron ore mining leases in Maharashtra (Surjagarh mine), giving 30-40% cost advantage over peers reliant on merchant ore.
near_catalyst: Iron ore mine production ramp from ~5 MT to 10+ MT annually in FY26 will dramatically improve blended margins as high-margin mining revenue scales.
key_risk: Single-location concentration and iron ore price cyclicality

name: Natco Pharma Limited
growth_plan: Building Rs 500 Cr oncology/specialty injectable facility for US/EU, expanding gRevlimid market share, and preparing 15+ complex generic ANDAs for FY26-28.
peer_moat: Para-IV first-to-file on high-value oncology generics (Revlimid, Ibrutinib, Ponatinib) with proven patent challenge track record against innovators.
near_catalyst: gCopaxone 40mg and gIbrutinib US launches in FY26, each Rs 500+ Cr peak revenue opportunity.
key_risk: Binary patent litigation outcomes and lumpy limited-competition revenues

name: Anand Rathi Wealth Limited

peer_moat: Pure-play wealth management (not diversified broker) with 97%+ trail-revenue model giving 85%+ revenue visibility and industry-leading 40%+ PAT margins.
near_catalyst: HNI wealth growing 15%+ CAGR; adding Rs 2,000+ Cr net new AUM per quarter with improving wallet share.
key_risk: Key-man risk (founder-driven) and MF TER regulation changes

name: Kfin Technologies Limited
growth_plan: Expanding international RTA (Malaysia, Philippines), building AIF/PMS fund administration and corporate registry digitization — 20%+ revenue CAGR on asset-light SaaS model.
peer_moat: Duopoly with CAMS in MF RTA market (~45% share), 10-year sticky contracts, 85%+ gross margins — regulatory barriers make new entry near-impossible.
near_catalyst: MF AUM at Rs 70L Cr + Rs 25,000+ Cr monthly SIPs creates automatic volume-linked revenue growth; new AIF/PMS mandates expand TAM in FY26.

name: Netweb Technologies India Limited
growth_plan: Expanding to 10,000+ server capacity/year and GPU-as-a-Service cloud infra; targeting Rs 2,500+ Cr revenue by FY27 riding India's Rs 10,000 Cr AI Mission.
peer_moat: India's only listed pure-play HPC/AI server OEM with NVIDIA DGX-ready certification, proprietary liquid cooling IP, and CDAC/ISRO/defence integration — no Indian peer has this.
near_catalyst: India AI Mission's Rs 10,000 Cr compute allocation + wins from Yotta/NxtGen data centers for GPU clusters signal accelerating FY26 demand.
key_risk: NVIDIA GPU supply constraints and lumpy govt order cycles

name: Indiamart Intermesh Limited
growth_plan: Targeting 10,000+ paying subscriber net-adds/quarter + scaling Busy Infotech (cloud accounting SaaS) to build full B2B operating system.
peer_moat: Dominant B2B marketplace (200M+ listings, 7.5M+ storefronts) — JustDial pivoted away, making IndiaMART the de-facto monopoly in B2B discovery.
near_catalyst: Silver/Platinum tier ARPU growth + Busy Infotech crossing Rs 100 Cr revenue run-rate, validating the B2B SaaS bundle thesis.
key_risk: Paying subscriber net-add deceleration amid SME spending slowdown

name: Indian Railway Catering And Tourism Corporation Limited
growth_plan: Scaling Bharat Gaurav tourist trains to 200+ departures/year, e-catering to 500+ stations, new tourism packages leveraging Vande Bharat sleeper rollout.
peer_moat: Statutory monopoly on Indian Railways ticketing (~1.5B tickets/year) and sole authorized catering licensee — 25M daily captive passenger base no private player can access.
near_catalyst: Potential convenience fee hike (unchanged since 2019) + premium train tourism surge with Vande Bharat sleeper coaches launch.

name: FORCE MOTORS LTD
multibagger_reason: exceptional quarterly growth; outperforming market; low debt
growth_plan: Ramping Sanand plant for next-gen BMW/Mercedes powertrain assemblies + new Traveller/Gurkha models, Rs 800 Cr capex over FY25-27 to double premium OEM revenue.
peer_moat: Only Indian company with exclusive powertrain supply for both BMW and Mercedes India — a 20+ year sticky relationship with deep engineering integration no peer has replicated.
near_catalyst: BMW X3/X5 and Mercedes GLC India production ramp driving 25-30% YoY growth in high-margin powertrain revenues through FY26-27.
key_risk: Luxury auto cyclicality; BMW ~40% of revenue

name: Eicher Motors Limited
growth_plan: New Vallam Vadagal CKD/export hub + Bhopal expansion to 13 lakh+ units/year by FY27; launching electric Himalayan and 2-3 new ICE platforms.
peer_moat: 95%+ share of 250-750cc mid-size segment with unmatched brand cult, 2,200+ exclusive stores, and 40%+ EBITDA margins — Harley/Triumph haven't dented share.
near_catalyst: Electric Himalayan H2FY26 launch + export traction targeting 1.5 lakh+ international shipments; VECV CV recovery with infra spending uptick.
key_risk: Stagnating domestic 350cc volumes if premiumization slows

name: Maruti Suzuki India Limited
multibagger_reason: strong quarterly growth; outperforming market; low debt

name: CCL Products (India) Limited
growth_plan: Doubling Vietnam plant to 20,000 MT + Swiss freeze-dry facility, taking global capacity to 55,000+ MT by FY27 for Walmart/Costco/European retailer private-label demand.
peer_moat: World's largest private-label instant coffee maker (50,000+ MT, India+Vietnam+Switzerland) — vertically integrated bean-to-cup with cost edge over Nestle/JDE own manufacturing.
near_catalyst: Record Arabica prices driving brands to outsource more to CCL — visible in H2FY26 order pipeline growth.
key_risk: Robusta/Arabica price volatility squeezing pass-through margins

name: Nestle India Limited
growth_plan: 9th factory in Odisha (Rs 900 Cr) for noodles/confectionery/pet food (Purina), targeting 50+ new launches/year through premiumization and health-focus.
peer_moat: Maggi 60%+ instant noodle share + Cerelac/NAN infant nutrition dominance, 5M+ outlet reach — Nestle global R&D moat no domestic FMCG matches in packaged foods.
near_catalyst: Gross margin expansion from benign commodities (palm oil, wheat) + urban on-the-go volume recovery.
key_risk: FSSAI regulatory tightening on sugar/salt in packaged foods

name: Data Patterns (India) Limited
growth_plan: Rs 2,500+ Cr order book, scaling to Rs 1,000 Cr revenue by FY27 via LRDE radars, BrahMos subsystems, naval combat systems, and ISRO/IN-SPACe satellite electronics.
peer_moat: One of 3-4 private companies with DRDO/MoD certification for mission-critical defence electronics (radars, EW suites, seekers) end-to-end — 5+ years to replicate.
near_catalyst: Rs 1.72 lakh Cr defence capital outlay with 75% indigenization mandate; prime beneficiary of BrahMos/Akash-NG production ramp.
key_risk: Lumpy order book and long defence procurement cycles
